summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 open PRs. The shard is not a dedupe cluster, no canonical is selected, no security-sensitive item was detected, and no mutating close/merge/fix action is recommended.

actions.reason: Open candidate PR with a related linked issue and unresolved proof/check state; keep it in queue rather than close or merge.
Related to gateway config/restart incidents, but not a duplicate/superseded cleanup target; keep open for maintainer review.
Broad feature implementation tied to an open product-design thread; keep related and do not close, merge, or synthesize a canonical in this inventory shard.
Related configuration/agent feature work is not ready for cleanup or merge; keep open with proof and check blockers.
Related to the closed slot-owner RFC but still an open, unproven implementation PR; keep it rather than close as duplicate or superseded.
Maintainer-owned narrow fix with no duplicate/supersession evidence; keep independent for normal maintainer handling.
Standalone Telegram behavior PR with proof blockers; keep independent and do not close or merge in this shard.
Recent active standalone CLI update PR with proof/bot-check blockers; keep independent.
Focused standalone agents PR appears viable but merge is blocked by plan-mode/job policy and missing merge preflight; keep independent.
Maintainer-owned narrow test fixture cleanup; keep independent for normal maintainer handling.
